sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4463" key="a)lloio/strofos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλλοιό-στροφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n4463.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of irregular strophes</tr_>, i.e. not consisting of alternate strophe and antistrophe, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Poeëm.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
